subcodes.title: Words to the Master's entourage, spoken on 1913-03-14
subcodes.first_line: Religion without prayer is no religion; but in this Movement work and worship must go hand in hand; one must inspire the other.
subcodes.first_line_orig: بلی در آیات بدیعه نازل که کار و شغل حکم عبادت دارد ولی این دلیل بر آن نیست که عبادات و اذکار
subcodes.subjects: @importance of prayer, @role of the Covenant in preserving unity, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @work as worship, @contention and conflict
